mapper.update: UPDATE admin_sm_user_role_rel SET checked=1 WHERE role_id=#{roleId} and user_id=#{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.login_code, u.user_name, u.user_code, u.deadline, u.org_id, o.org_name, u.last_chg_usr, u.last_chg_dt FROM admin_sm_user u LEFT JOIN admin_sm_org o ON u.org_id = o.org_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}
select role_id from admin_sm_user_role_rel where user_id=#{userId}

SELECT u.user_id, u.login_code, u.user_name, u.user_code, u.deadline, u.org_id, o.org_name, u.last_chg_usr, u.last_chg_dt FROM admin_sm_user u LEFT JOIN admin_sm_org o ON u.org_id = o.org_id RIGHT JOIN admin_sm_user_role_rel r on u.user_id=r.user_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

select vo.* from ( SELECT u.user_id, u.login_code, u.user_name, u.user_code, u.deadline, u.org_id, o.org_name, u.last_chg_usr, u.last_chg_dt FROM admin_sm_user u LEFT JOIN admin_sm_org o ON u.org_id = o.org_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}) vo where vo.user_id not in (select user_id from admin_sm_user_role_rel where role_id=#{roleId})
